programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple from Humble, Texas, want to feel like they've finally made it by purchasing a big, new home for their growing family; she wants a two-story house with a grand entrance, while he hates the idea of walking up stairs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Camden County, N.J., woman promised herself that if she beat cancer, she'd buy herself a motorcycle and a house; she has the motorcycle, so now she's setting out to find the perfect home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After years of saving and countless trips to Mexico, Kenn and Paddy are ready for the life-changing adventure of running their own business.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Leaving No Stone Unturned in Connecticut
programme.desc: A Connecticut family look for a beach house to help them spend more time together; they love nearby Stonington, and with its unique maritime history they think it's the perfect location for their new vacation home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: A battle of barbecue's best; The five winning teams from all competitions go head to head.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.sub-title: Deep in the Heart of BBQ
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Texas, pitmasters Buzzie Hughes, Will Fleischman and Ernest Servantes compete to see who's got the best 'cue in Texas. The competition get heated the three teams compete for the title of BBQ Pitmasters Texas Champion.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: The Peach State is known for having some of the best BBQ in the South. Bear Sloan, Danny Outlaw, and Dionn Lanton compete to see who can cook the best country-style ribs and pork picnic. Up for grabs is the title of BBQ Pitmasters Georgia Champion.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: Craig Blondis of Central BBQ, Mark West of 10 Bones BBQ and Carey Bringle of Peg Leg Porker compete for the title of BBQ Pitmasters Memphis Champion.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters
programme.desc: Pride is on the line for Rod Gray of Pellet Envy, Tim Grant of TrueBud BBQ and Stretch of Grinders BBQ. All three teams battle for the title of BBQ Pitmasters Kansas City Champion.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A drag performer living in Los Angeles searches for a getaway in Palm Springs; with the help of his friend, he may have to get over his picky tendencies if he hopes to find the party palace he envisions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Ready for a Family in Rochester
programme.desc: First-time buyers seek a home in Rochester, N.Y.; she's looking for a place with a home office near the city but he's hoping for a big backyard and a little privacy farther out; most of all, this couple needs more room to start their family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Sister Doesn't Know Best in San Antonio
programme.desc: An HR executive is moving to San Antonio so he can start a new job closer to his son; he wants a home with tall ceilings for the fancy fan he's bringing with him, but his friend thinks it's ridiculous to pick a house around a single object.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young Denver couple is ready to take the next step and buy a home; he wants a new build with modern designs and amenities that he's used to, but she prefers an older home with charm and character.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: A New Groove in Athens, GA
programme.desc: First-time buyers in Georgia escape the pricier Atlanta market by relocating to nearby Athens, where they hope their money will go further; she's an artist and needs a space where she can paint, while he's a touring musician and wants a music studio.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Bedroom-Sized Closet Wanted in Southern California
programme.desc: Fashion executives have a long wish list for their first house together; however, in the pricey Southern California market, their budget might not allow them to get a few things they would like.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: The Battle of the Southern Charmer
programme.desc: A real estate lawyer and a real estate broker vie over which house will be the better Southern charmer for their growing family in North Carolina; he wants a one-story home with historical appeal, but her heart is set on a two-story new construction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: College sweethearts want to upgrade their home in the Bay Area, but they don't see eye to eye on their wish lists; he wants a Mediterranean-style home that's wheelchair accessible, while she's hoping for a modern place with a new kitchen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Chris and Rowena live in East Kingston, N.H. with their three children and love Hampton Beach, but are tired of sitting in traffic during the commute, so owning beachfront property would give them more time together as a family.

programme.sub-title: Getting the Family Together in Gulf Shores, Alabama

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.sub-title: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: From a giant BBQ stuffed baked potato at the Houston Livestock show, to a Fort Worth Tex-Mex Burrito almost as big as the state itself, Noah discovers that everything is bigger, and yummier, in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats; he sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich; from classic beef burgers to exotic meats to buns made from pretzels and even donuts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe investigates the Great American Foodie Fest in Nevada and gets lucky with some monster meat meals like the Katsu Curry Sandwich; at the Kittitas County Fair in Washington, Noah goes local with the Beefalo Burger and Hucklepeach Donuts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Alaska State Fair; tries some local fresh seafood and state secrets, including the Sasquatch Sandwich; Noah discovers that mornings are brighter when the day starts with Country Breakfast Tots and Peach Fritter Funnel Cake.
